summary: Iteration 4 — frontend-only regression test of the large React refactoring session (component extraction, hook deps, content-derived keys, catch-block logging). All critical user flows verified on the live preview URL and ZERO React warnings observed in browser console across homepage, product detail, admin (all 5 tabs), support pages, about, chat, and checkout-success. The refactor is behavior-neutral as intended.

issues: Guest /api/auth/me probe still emits a 401 console error on every page load (carried from iter 2/3). Cosmetic only — does not affect functionality.

action_items: (Optional/Cosmetic, carried forward) Silence guest /api/auth/me 401 console noise — wrap in try/catch in AuthContext.

(Doc note) The data-testids assumed in the review_request differ from actual code for a few items — actual names: os-option-pc (not -windows), qty-value (not qty-input), need-help-card / why-buy-card (not -section). No fix needed; tests adjusted accordingly.
critical_code_review_comments: Hero.jsx / HeroVisual.jsx split is clean — hero cards (main/windows/mac) all render and link to product pages.
ProductDetailInfo.jsx OptionSelector is properly generic — variant switching navigates between products (Mac click → /product/office-home-2024-mac verified).
Admin tab extraction into /components/admin/{Products,Orders,Leads,Keys,Emails}Tab.jsx works — all 5 tabs reachable, inline edit and save flow on Products tab works end-to-end.

JivoChat refactor: lead form (chat-lead-form) renders with name/email/phone inputs, lead-callback-btn and lead-skip-btn both present. After Skip, chat-input + chat-send-btn work and a streamed AI reply ('Our Office 2024 pricing varies by edition…') was received and rendered without any React key warnings.
SupportPage.jsx content-derived keys: /page/help-center, /page/customer-reviews, /page/contact-us all render cleanly with no duplicate-key warnings.
CheckoutSuccess useEffect deps [sessionId, clear] correct: visiting /checkout/success without session_id immediately shows payment-failed testid as expected.
AuthContext catch-block logging change is behavior-neutral — logout fully clears session and redirects to /login.

Browser console verified clean (0 React warnings) on Home, Product Detail, Admin (all 5 tabs), Help Center, Customer Reviews, Contact Us, About Us, Cart, Checkout Success, and Chat widget — primary goal of the refactor achieved.
seed_data_creation: None this iteration. Inline-edited and reverted one product price (office-home-2024-pc) via admin Products tab to verify save flow.
context_for_next_testing_agent: This was a pure regression test of a frontend refactoring session. All hero cards, product-detail variant selectors, qty stepper, add-to-cart toast, admin tabs (Products/Orders/Leads/Keys/Emails), price-inline-edit-save, support pages, about-us, checkout-success failed state, AI chat lead-form + send flow, and login/logout were verified. ZERO React warnings observed. If next iteration adds new features, focus on those — refactored areas are stable. Note: data-testid name differences vs review_request listed in action_items (cosmetic only).
rca of the issue: No issues found. Refactor objectives met: component extraction is clean, hook dependency arrays are correct (verified via behavior — no stale closures observed), content-derived keys eliminated index-key warnings, and catch-block logging change is behavior-neutral.
